motion: Should PR #28: epic: Frontend Scaffold & Integration be merged into main?

findings.description: selectTable race condition — concurrent table clicks can corrupt UI state (last-write-wins with no cancellation guard)
findings.fix_description: Add a monotonic request counter. At entry, increment and capture const myId = ++requestId. After the await, guard: if (myId !== requestId) return.

findings.description: CSV error row is invalid CSV — '# ERROR:' line appended on mid-stream failure is ingested as data by downstream parsers
findings.fix_description: Remove the error comment row (lines 322-328). The tracing::warn at line 321 already logs the event. Truncated output is safer than corrupt output.

findings.description: csv::Writer instantiated per row in export loop — 500K Writer allocations for large table exports
findings.fix_description: Create one csv::Writer before the loop. Flush at batch boundaries, take the buffer, send the chunk.

findings.description: goToPage sets currentPage before fetch confirms — on failure, StatusBar shows wrong page number
findings.fix_description: Move currentPage = page to after queryResult = result inside the try block.

findings.description: Content-Disposition filename not sanitized — display name with quotes or semicolons produces malformed header
findings.fix_description: Strip double-quote, semicolon, CR, LF from filename before header injection.

conditions: Findings #4 and #5 acceptable as fast follow-ups
